_note: Curated baseline. These events ALWAYS merge into events-data.json. The weekly web harvester can ADD events to the calendar but can NEVER delete anything listed here. Put events you know are real but that a one-shot web search may miss: recurring seasonal series, club events posted only on a club's own calendar, etc. Recurring rows persist until season_end. Dated rows drop automatically after they pass, so refresh a dated annual entry (like the Home Tour) once a year, or let the harvester pick up the next year's date on its own. NEARBY festival anchors (area 'nearby' + a town) will NOT be refreshed by the Cayucos web harvester, so re-date them by hand each year after they pass.

events.title: Live music Sundays at Schooners
events.window: Sunday evenings, 6 to 8pm, May through October
events.summary: Free live music on the oceanfront patio on Sunday evenings through October.

events.title: Cayucos Lioness Home Tour
events.summary: Annual self-guided home tour fundraiser hosted by the Cayucos Lioness Club.

events.title: Pinedorado Days
events.summary: Cambria's Labor Day weekend tradition, Sept 5 to 7: Saturday morning parade at 9:30, plus BBQ, kiddie rides, live music, and a Sunday car show. ~20 min north.

events.title: Morro Bay Avocado & Margarita Street Festival
events.summary: Waterfront street party on the Embarcadero with avocado dishes, margaritas, live music, and vendors. Ticketed. About 15 minutes south.

events.title: Cambria Scarecrow Festival
events.venue: Throughout Cambria, Moonstone Beach & San Simeon
events.summary: All October: 200+ handmade scarecrows line the villages and beach of Cambria and San Simeon. Free, self-guided, viewable any time. ~20 min north.

events.title: Cambria Christmas Market
events.venue: Cambria Pines Lodge, 2905 Burton Dr, Cambria
events.summary: Nov 27 to Dec 31: German-style holiday market with 3+ million lights, vendors, food, a train ride, and Santa. Ticketed; closed select nights. ~20 min north.
